scripts.build: npm run build -w @the-volumn/shared && npm run build -w @the-volumn/backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run build -w @the-volumn/shared && npm run test -w @the-volumn/shared && npm run test -w @the-volumn/backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @the-volumn/shared && npm run lint -w @the-volumn/shared && npm run lint -w @the-volumn/backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @the-volumn/shared && npm run typecheck -w @the-volumn/backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
